titulo: Sua Nova Ferramenta: Dominando a Interface
prompt: Minimalist digital illustration, dark background #0A0A0F. A glowing orange (#FF6B00) futuristic tool silhouette made of music production UI elements — faders, knobs, waveform displays and buttons. Subtle lime green (#C6FF00) accent highlights on key buttons. Soft neon glow and light particles. Clean, premium feel, no text. 16:9 aspect ratio.

Minimalist digital illustration, dark background #0A0A0F. A stylized gear/engine icon being fine-tuned by a glowing orange (#FF6B00) wrench, with sound wave frequencies flowing through the gear teeth. Small lime green (#C6FF00) checkmarks and indicator lights showing ready status. Subtle neon glow, clean and premium. No text. 16:9 aspect ratio.

titulo: Mão na Massa: Construindo seu Primeiro Beat
prompt: Minimalist digital illustration, dark background #0A0A0F. Two hands building/stacking glowing orange (#FF6B00) music blocks — drum pads, piano keys and waveforms — assembling them like construction pieces into a beat grid. Lime green (#C6FF00) particles and sparks where pieces connect. Dynamic energy, premium feel. No text. 16:9 aspect ratio.

titulo: Visão de Produtor: Organizando o Projeto
prompt: Minimalist digital illustration, dark background #0A0A0F. A top-down view of a perfectly organized music timeline/arrangement — color-coded tracks in orange (#FF6B00), lime green (#C6FF00) and soft purple (#B0AACC), neatly aligned in rows. A subtle eye or lens icon overseeing the arrangement. Clean grid lines, soft neon glow, premium aesthetic. No text. 16:9 aspect ratio.

titulo: Toque Final: Mix, Master e Export
prompt: Minimalist digital illustration, dark background #0A0A0F. A mastering console with glowing orange (#FF6B00) VU meters and EQ curves, with a final polished diamond or gemstone emerging from the top — representing the finished song. Lime green (#C6FF00) sparkles and a subtle export/download arrow. Refined, premium atmosphere with soft neon glow. No text. 16:9 aspect ratio.
